info.title: Hospital-Doctor Platform API
info.description: Production-ready backend APIs for authentication, doctor and hospital profile management, approval workflows, doctor-hospital mapping, subscriptions, department management, and admin operations.

tags.name: Department Selection
tags.description: Department listing and department management APIs.

tags.name: Doctor Module
tags.description: Doctor profile creation, retrieval, and hospital selection APIs.

tags.name: Hospital Module
tags.description: Hospital profile, pending doctor approvals, and subscription APIs.

tags.name: Schedule Module
tags.description: Doctor scheduling, availability summaries, and patient token assignment APIs.

tags.name: Admin Module
tags.description: Admin approval, filtering, pagination, and subscription management APIs.

tags.name: Super Admin Module
tags.description: Super admin APIs for managing admin users.

message.example: Status must be pending, approved or rejected

departmentId.description: Required for common_user registration. Optional in current doctor registration flow.

post.description: Registers a doctor, hospital, common user, or admin in the existing auth flow. All new accounts start with pending approval. OTP is printed in the server terminal for verification.
Validates email and password and blocks users whose approval status is not approved. On success, OTP is generated for login verification.

example.message: OTP sent. Please verify to complete login.
Your account is still pending admin approval

post.description: Verifies login OTP and returns a JWT token.
Adds a hospital to the doctor's selected list. Duplicate selections are rejected.

get.description: Only the owning approved hospital account can view this endpoint. If a hospital override exists, it is returned; otherwise the default subscription is used.

get.summary: Legacy alias for get hospital profile

put.summary: Legacy alias for assign or update hospital department

get.description: Returns hospital info, department choices, approved doctors for that hospital, and consultation time options for the doctor schedule frontend.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Defaults to the current server date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

post.description: Creates a doctor availability schedule for an approved doctor of the current hospital. The backend validates department match, past dates, slot generation, and overlapping time ranges.

example.message: This doctor already has an overlapping schedule on the selected date

post.description: Books the earliest available slot for the selected department and date, optionally restricted to a specific doctor, and persists a patient token record.

get.description: Supports filtering by approval status, sorting, and pagination.
Supports filtering by approval status, sorting, and pagination.

patch.description: Legacy generic approval endpoint. Prefer the doctor and hospital status endpoints for those role-specific flows.
Legacy generic approval endpoint. Prefer the doctor and hospital status endpoints for those role-specific flows.
